def solve(nums, queries)
    ans = []
    queries.each do |li, ri, threshold|
        sub = nums[li..ri]
        freq = Hash.new(0)
        sub.each do |num|
            freq[num] += 1
        end
        candidates = freq.select { |k, v| v >= threshold }
        if candidates.empty?
            ans << -1
        else
            max_freq = -1
            best_num = -1

                if count > max_freq || (count == max_freq && num < best_num)
                    max_freq = count
                    best_num = num
                end
            end
            ans << best_num
        end
    end
    ans
end
